description_long: This is an irregularly shaped, medium-sized stone with a rugged, natural appearance. Its surface is mottled with a mix of earthy browns, yellows, and dark gray to black patches, giving it a visually complex and organic look. The stone features a variety of textures, including rough, pitted areas and smoother, slightly weathered sections. One side displays a small, rectangular label, suggesting it may have been cataloged or collected for study or landscaping. The stone's edges are uneven and jagged, with some rounded corners and protrusions. Its overall form suggests it could have been shaped by natural erosion or weathering processes.
description: A rugged, irregularly shaped stone with mottled brown, yellow, and dark gray colors, featuring rough and pitted textures. It has a natural, weathered appearance and a small label on one side.
description_view_0: This view shows the broadest face of the stone, highlighting its mottled coloration and rough, uneven surface with several dark patches.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the stone's jagged edge and elongated profile, with more visible yellow and brown tones and fewer dark spots.
description_view_2: This side reveals the small rectangular label attached to the stone, as well as a flatter, lighter-colored surface with scattered dark inclusions.
description_view_3: This perspective displays the stone's most rugged and irregular surface, with deep textures and a mix of brown and dark gray hues.
attribute_location: urban park landscaping or roadside edge
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or partially embedded in soil or gravel
attribute_pattern: Mottled pattern with irregular patches of brown, yellow, and dark gray, interspersed with lighter spots and occasional inclusions.
attribute_weathering: Rough and pitted with signs of natural weathering, some smoother areas indicating moderate exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Typically blends with natural ground cover or gravel, but may contrast with paved surfaces or manicured lawns; label suggests some human intervention or cataloging.
